introSection: Mad Mouse or Vilda Musen as it is also called is a Spinning coasterat at the  amusement park Tosselilla in Sweden, that was manufactured by Fabbri. It opened in 2009.
fullText: Mad Mouse or Vilda Musen as it is also called is a Spinning coasterat at the  amusement park Tosselilla in Sweden, that was manufactured by Fabbri. It opened in 2009.
